headline: Globe Life (GL) Stock Looks Reasonable As Its 106% Five Year Run Continues
summary: Globe Life stock has more than doubled over the past five years, and after that kind of run the current checks suggest it no longer looks clearly cheap or clearly expensive, but somewhere in between. Globe Life has returned 105.5% over 5 years, which puts the focus on whether the current share price already reflects most of the good news that investors have been willing to pay for. For a life and health insurer like Globe Life, expectations around steady policy growth and underwriting...
